title: General Knowledge Grab Bag
description: A quick round of everyday facts, famous places, nature, and classic knowledge.

questions.prompt: What is the capital city of Canada?
questions.hint: It is in Ontario, but it is not the province's largest city.
questions.explanation: Ottawa is Canada's capital city. Toronto is Ontario's capital and Canada's largest city.

questions.prompt: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.hint: Its rusty color comes from iron oxide on the surface.
questions.explanation: Mars is called the Red Planet because iron-rich dust gives it a reddish appearance.

questions.prompt: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
questions.hint: It covers more area than all land on Earth combined.
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is Earth's largest and deepest ocean.

questions.hint: The same playwright wrote 'Macbeth' and 'Romeo and Juliet.'
questions.explanation: William Shakespeare wrote 'Hamlet' around the turn of the 17th century.

questions.prompt: The tallest mountain above sea level is Mount _____.
questions.explanation: Mount Everest is the tallest mountain above sea level.

questions.prompt: Which gas do plants absorb from the air during photosynthesis?
questions.hint: It is the gas humans exhale as a waste product.
questions.explanation: Plants use carbon dioxide, water, and light energy to make sugars during photosynthesis.

questions.prompt: How many sides does a triangle have?
questions.explanation: A triangle has three sides and three angles.

questions.prompt: The Mona Lisa is displayed at the Louvre Museum in Paris.
questions.hint: The museum is famous for its glass pyramid entrance.
questions.explanation: Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa is displayed at the Louvre Museum in Paris.
